# MuleSoft SAP S/4HANA SOAP Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (2.6) of SAP S/4HANA SOAP Connector documentation.
> See [SAP S/4HANA SOAP Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sap-s4hana-soap-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the SAP S/4HANA SOAP Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [SAP S/4HANA SOAP Connector 2.6](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sap-s4hana-soap-connector/latest/index.md)
- [SAP S/4HANA SOAP Connector 2.6 Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sap-s4hana-soap-connector/latest/sap-s4hana-soap-connector-examples.md)
- [SAP S/4HANA SOAP Connector 2.6 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sap-s4hana-soap-connector/latest/sap-s4hana-soap-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure SAP S/4HANA SOAP Connector 2.6](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sap-s4hana-soap-connector/latest/sap-s4hana-soap-connector-studio.md)
- [Upgrading and Migrating SAP S/4HANA SOAP Connector to 2.x](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sap-s4hana-soap-connector/latest/sap-s4hana-soap-connector-upgrade-migrate.md)
- [Web Service Addressing Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sap-s4hana-soap-connector/latest/sap-s4hana-soap-connector-ws-addressing.md)
- [SAP S/4HANA SOAP Connector 2.6 XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sap-s4hana-soap-connector/latest/sap-s4hana-soap-connector-xml-maven.md)
